trivia_bullets.text: Siege Striker is a new card from Core Set 2021 (July 3, 2020), not reprinted in a standard set as of 2026 (only the M21 foil promo variant exists as an alternate printing). It fills the role of a white aggro threat designed for M21 limited format.

Double strike combined with tap-to-pump creates a scaling combat threat: each creature tapped before damage adds 2 effective damage (once first strike, once regular). Floor is a weak 1/1 double striker for 3 mana; ceiling with two tapped creatures is a 3/3 double striker dealing 6 damage. Explicitly rewards attacking wide.

Siege Striker carries no flavor text on either printing. The visual storytelling — outnumbered warrior, defiant posture — does the narrative work the text box would otherwise do. No flavor text on a 3-mana uncommon creature is somewhat unusual.

Siege Striker and Makeshift Battalion (no. 26, same wave) are both illustrated by Zoltan Boros in M21, making him responsible for two of the set's white aggro common/uncommon creatures in the same release.
EDHREC rank 23470 — minimal Commander presence. The card's linear design toward attacking-wide strategies doesn't translate well to the toolbox-style play Commander favors.

related_cards.name: Makeshift Battalion
related_cards.note: Also illustrated by Zoltan Boros in M21; the two form a coherent white aggro pair in the same set

related_cards.name: Odric, Lunarch Marshal
related_cards.note: Rare that spreads double strike to all attackers, directly synergizing with Siege Striker

related_cards.name: Veteran Swordsmith
related_cards.note: Comparable 'attacking-wide rewards' white aggro design pattern
